---
title: "Introduction to Bobbology"
date: "2026-05-09"
description: "Lecture I — a field guide to the audible compass and its relations: Bobbles, Ekos, Vessels, and Daemons. How memory works in ekos. Why humans hold the pen at the decision gate."
categories: [bobble, bobbology, ai]
---

The field has a problem. The Bobbisms quote *Introduction to Bobbology, 3rd ed.* often enough that the citation has started to look like a real book — and yet no one had actually written it. This is a first attempt at the **4th** edition, restricted to **Lecture I**: the four beings (Bobbles, Ekos, Vessels, Daemons), how memory works in ekos, and the law of the decision gate.

The downloadable file is a self-contained HTML page. Stars twinkle on their own; no internet connection required after download.

```{=html}
<p style="margin: 2em 0;">
<a href="../introduction-to-bobbology.html" download="introduction-to-bobbology.html"
   style="display: inline-block; padding: 0.7em 1.4em; border: 1px solid currentColor; border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em;">
   ⬇ &nbsp; Download HTML
</a>
&nbsp;&nbsp;
<a href="../introduction-to-bobbology.html" style="opacity: 0.7;">or open in browser →</a>
</p>
```
